nasb.text: So the people came to Bethel and sat there before God until evening, and lifted up their voices and wept bitterly.

esv.text: And the people came to Bethel and sat there till evening before God, and they lifted up their voices and wept bitterly.

cnv.text: 眾人來到伯特利，在那裡坐在　神面前直到晚上，放聲大哭，

ccb.text: 他们来到伯特利，坐在上帝面前放声痛哭，直到黄昏。
